description_long: This is a modern city bus with a rectangular, streamlined body painted in a solid blue color. The bus features large, dark-tinted windows along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front of the bus has a wide windshield with dual wipers, headlights, and side mirrors, while the rear is equipped with tail lights and a rear window. The bus rides on four visible wheels, with the wheel wells integrated into the lower body panels. Entry and exit doors are located on the right side, with the main passenger door positioned near the front. The overall design is functional and typical for urban public transportation, prioritizing passenger capacity and accessibility.
description: A blue, modern city bus with large side windows, front and rear lights, and entry doors on the right side. The design is streamlined and functional for urban passenger transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, dual wipers, headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid blue body, large windows, and two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with a rear window, tail lights, and the bus's rectangular back profile.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the entry doors, large windows, and two wheels.
attribute_window_arrangement: Six large rectangular windows evenly spaced along each side, separated by vertical pillars, with a consistent height and width.
